zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Seton於1190年出生時，他的父親Alexander Seton26歲，母親Margaret Berkeley18歲。他於1214年之前與Janet Giffard在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1249年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓享年59歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Seton于1190年出生时，他的父亲Alexander Seton26岁，母亲Margaret Berkeley18岁。他于1214年之前与Janet Giffard在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1249年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓享年59岁，埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Seton was born in 1190, his father, Alexander Seton, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Berkeley, was 18. He married Janet Giffard before 1214, in Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1249, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 59, and was buried in Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Seton est né en 1190, son père, Alexander Seton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Berkeley, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Janet Giffard avant 1214, à Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1249, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Seton 1190 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Seton 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Berkeley 18. Er hat vor 1214 in Haddingtonshire, Scotland Janet Giffard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1249 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Seton è nato il nel 1190, il suo padre, Alexander Seton, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Berkeley, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Janet Giffard prima del 1214, nel Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1249, nel Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Setonが1190年に生まれた時，父Alexander Setonは26歳，母Margaret Berkeleyは18歳であった。1214年以前にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアでJanet Giffardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1249年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンで59歳で死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Seton(이)가 1190년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Seton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Berkeley(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1214년 이전 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에서 Janet Giffard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1249년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Seton nasceu em 1190, seu pai, Alexander Seton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Berkeley, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Giffard antes 1214, em Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1249, em Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Seton родился в 1190 г., его отцу по имени Alexander Seton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Berkeley, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Giffard перед 1214 г. в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1249 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam Seton nació en 1190, su papá, Alexander Seton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Berkeley, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Janet Giffard antes de 1214, en Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1249, en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
